name: Partially my fault for bad website, but AI rankings worse. Still eligible to sue?
description: Yes if AI added harm; prove it.[1]

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault for bad website, but AI rankings worse. Still eligible to sue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if AI added harm; prove it.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Eligibility reduced but possible if AI exacerbated independently provable.[1][3] Key factors: comparative fault, mitigation.[1] Prove incremental harm, show fixes attempted.[1] Weaker but actionable.
